about.title: CORNERSTONE Open Platform
about.subtitle: OPENSOURCE PDK live monitor
about.notes:
Licence free PDK monitoring and management dashboard.
First version designed by Dr. Emre Kaplan (beta release: 01/05/2026).
The portal is open to everyone for further development.

documents.rawText:
# Auto-generated by CORNERSTONE PDK Monitor v1.0.0
# Edit freely — this file is a starting point, not authoritative.

name: SOI220nm_1550nm_TE_RIB_Waveguide
description: ""
bb_type: waveguide
category: passive
platform: SOI 220 nm Passive
status: available
owner: admin
updated: "2026-05-26"
gds_file: components/SOI220nm_1550nm_TE_RIB_Waveguide.gds

layers:
  - layer: 3
    datatype: undefined
  - layer: 5
    datatype: undefined

parameters:
  width_nm: 500
  length_um: 100
  thickness_nm: 220

source_url: "https://github.com/cornerstone-uos/cornerstone-community/blob/main/Si_220nm_passive/components/SOI220nm_1550nm_TE_RIB_Waveguide.gds"

externalized.note: Per-BB folder layout: users/https-github.com-AEmreKaplan-/<bb>/<section>/<file> — section folders are tab-named one-to-one with the BB-panel tabs: layout (GDS / OASIS + canonical YAML), smatrix (S-matrix datasets), tests, fab, scripts, documents (non-canonical YAMLs + other docs), eda (eda_links.json), files (loose BB-level files), variants (recursive). Each item carries `repoPath` instead of inline bytes; adopters hydrate via the fetch-time helper. Re-publish is idempotent.
